title: Mildly Salty British Seaweed Spotted Dick
description: A traditional British steamed pudding featuring seaweed and capers, perfect for a snack or dessert. This dairy-free version is a great alternative to the classic recipe.
instructions: Preheat the steamer to 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sucrose, seaweed flakes, capers, lemon zest, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the non-dairy milk and lemon juice.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Fold in the vegan suet until the mixture is evenly distributed.
Add the baking powder and stir gently.
Spoon the mixture into a greased 1-pint pudding basin.
Cover the pudding with a piece of parchment paper and steam for 45 minutes.
Remove the pudding from the steamer and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the spotted dick warm, garnished with additional seaweed flakes if desired.
